_comment: Generated by dafke v0.4.1. DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY — run 'dafke update' to refresh.

hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage":"⚠️  DISCLAIMER: Put it all together, and you, the human submitter, bear full responsibility and accountability for reviewing the AI-generated code, ensuring license compliance, and for any bugs or security flaws that arise."}'
command -v dafke >/dev/null 2>&1 && dafke hook skills-check || true
command -v dafke >/dev/null 2>&1 && dafke hook doc-check || true
command -v dafke >/dev/null 2>&1 && dafke hook pre-edit || echo 'dafke not found in PATH — install with: npm i -g dafke'
command -v dafke >/dev/null 2>&1 && dafke hook pre-bash || echo 'dafke not found in PATH — install with: npm i -g dafke'
npx tsc --noEmit 2>/dev/null && npm run lint 2>/dev/null || echo 'Pre-commit checks: typecheck or lint failed — review before committing'
command -v dafke >/dev/null 2>&1 && dafke hook post-edit || echo 'dafke not found in PATH — install with: npm i -g dafke'
command -v dafke >/dev/null 2>&1 && dafke hook post-bash || echo 'dafke not found in PATH — install with: npm i -g dafke'
command -v dafke >/dev/null 2>&1 && dafke hook stop || echo 'dafke not found in PATH — install with: npm i -g dafke'
